zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Tolles II於1669年11月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可時，他的父親Henry Tolls40歲，母親Sarah Narna Mousall37歲。他於1693年4月13日與Dorothy Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1751年1月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年81歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Tolles II于1669年11月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可时，他的父亲Henry Tolls40岁，母亲Sarah Narna Mousall37岁。他于1693年4月13日与Dorothy Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1751年1月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年81岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Tolles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Towles  . This form of the surname has died out in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Towles
meanings: English (Middlesex and Leicestershire): variant of Towle , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Tole and Toll . This form of the surname has now died out in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.description: The city served as co-capital of Connecticut from 1701 until 1873

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Tolles II was born on 1 November 1669, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Tolls, was 40 and his mother, Sarah Narna Mousall, was 37. He married Dorothy Thomas on 13 April 1693, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in January 1751, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81, and was buried in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Tolles II est né le 1 novembre 1669, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Tolls, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sarah Narna Mousall, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Thomas le 13 avril 1693, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1751, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Tolles II am 1. November 1669 in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Tolls 40 und seine Mutter Sarah Narna Mousall 37. Er hat am 13. April 1693 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Dorothy Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1751 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tolles II è nato il il 1 novembre 1669 nel Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Henry Tolls, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Narna Mousall, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Thomas il 13 aprile 1693, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1751, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Tolles IIが1669年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで生まれた時，父Henry Tollsは40歳，母Sarah Narna Mousallは37歳であった。1693年4月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンでDorothy Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1751年1月にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで81歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Saybrook, Connecticut Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩

ko.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운
ko.East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 이스트 하븐
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Tolles II(이)가 1669년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Tolls(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Narna Mousall(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1693년 4월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 Dorothy Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1751년 1월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tolles II nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1669, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Tolls, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Narna Mousall, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Thomas em 13 de abril de 1693, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1751, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Tolles II родился 1 ноября 1669 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Tolls было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Narna Mousall, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Thomas 13 апреля 1693 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер январь 1751 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Tolles II nació el 1 de noviembre de 1669, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Tolls, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sarah Narna Mousall, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Dorothy Thomas el 13 de abril de 1693, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
